props.heading: Welcome to Aviara Design Co.
props.subheading: This is a Puck-managed page that lives alongside Aviara's existing hand-coded homepage. Open /admin/pages/home-editable to edit.

props.heading: WebsiteEditorKit dry-run port
props.body: If you can see this page rendered in Aviara's brand colors (warm cream, ink, brass accents), the theme bridging worked.
